name: Awesome Pinto Beans
directions: Tip: When shopping for pinto beans if not in bulk,always check the color!
Very important!  they should be pinkish or tan, the lighter the better!
Wash and wash.
Preboil then drain,cook slow about 3 hours,stir often.
Use black coffee in place of adding water at least 2 times.

name: Refried Beans
directions: Place beans in a dutch oven, add water to cover by 2 inches.
Bring to a boil; boil for 2 minutes.
Remove from the heat; cover and let stand for 1 hour.
Drain beans; discard liquid.
Return beans to pan; add water to cover.
Add onion and garlic; bring to a boil.
Cover and cook over low heat for 2 hours or until beans are very tender, adding water to keep covered if needed.
Discard onion and garlic.
Mash beans with a potato masher, leaving some beans whole.
Stir in cumin and hot pepper sauce.

name: Simple Chili
directions: Brown ground beef with onions and garlic in a large skillet.
Add the next 8 ingredients and simmer 10 minutes.
Add canned beans and cook on a low simmer another 10 minutes.
Enjoy!
If you find ANY errors, please let me know.

name: ranch beans
directions: drain the soaked beans, return to the pot add 1 quart of water, bring to a boil lower to simmer, cover, cook 1 1/2 hours.
add remaining ingredients, bring to a boil, cover, lower heat and simmer for 1 1/2 hrs more.

name: Homemade Chili
directions: Brown ground beef in olive oil with onions, garlic, and green peppers.
Drain excess fat and add remaining ingredients.
Salt and pepper to taste.
Cook on medium-low heat, covered, for 45-60 minutes.
Serve with shredded sharp cheddar cheese and diced onion.

name: Ranch Beans
directions: Rinse beans in cold water.  Place in 4-quart kettle.  Add hot water, onion and garlic.
Bring to a boil.  Reduce heat.  Partially cover and simmer 1 1/2 to 2 hrs., until tender. Add more water if needed.
Fry bacon crisp, reserving 1 tablespoons of drippings.  Crumble bacon.
Peel tomatoes.  Strain seeds and discard, saving juice.  Chop pulp.
Saute' tomatoes with juice and chiles in bacon drippings 10 minutes until reduced slightly.  Add to beans.  Add bacon.
Cook, uncovered, 15-20 minutes to blend flavors.  Add salt.
Serve in small bowls as a meat accompaniment.  Sprinkle with green onions.

name: Ranchero Beans
directions: Sort the beans, toss out all the rocks and imperfect beans. Rinse beans and place in a pot. Cover with water 2 inches above beans. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, covered for 1 1/2 hours, adding water if needed.
Add remaining ingredients, making sure water covers everything. Simmer about 1 1/2 hours.
Taste the beans and broth together in a spoon. If it is not spicy enough for you, dice the jalapeño or add a few drops of Tobasco to taste.
Serve in a cup or bowl.

name: California Barbecued Beans
directions: Place the beans and 6 cups water in a large Dutch oven.
Bring to a boil over high heat and cook for 5 minutes.
Remove the pot from the heat, cover and allow the beans to sit for 1 hour.
Drain the beans; clean and dry the pot.
Cook the bacon and ham in the Dutch oven over medium heat until the fat renders and the pork is lightly browned, 5-7 minutes.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add the drained beans and 6 cups water; bring to a simmer.
Decrease heat to med-low, cover, and cook until the beans are just soft, about 1 hour.
Stir in the tomato puree, taco sauce, sugar, mustard, and 2 teaspoons salt.
Continue to simmer, uncovered, until the beans are completely tender and the sauce is thickened, about 1 hour (if the mixture becomes too thick, add water).
Stir in the cilantro and vinegar and season with salt to taste.
Serve.
